crons.name: retention-cleanup-daily
crons.description: CHG-0831: Daily session retention via OpenClaw canonical maintenance (03:00 AEST)
crons.notes: CHG-0831: Now uses OpenClaw session.maintenance + openclaw sessions cleanup. retention-cleanup.sh is fallback only.

crons.name: retention-cleanup-report
crons.description: CHG-0831: Weekly retention audit report via OpenClaw canonical maintenance (Monday 05:00 AEST)
crons.notes: CHG-0831: Weekly audit using OpenClaw session.maintenance dry-run.

crons.name: retention-cleanup-canonical
crons.description: CHG-0831: Canonical session maintenance via OpenClaw session.maintenance config
crons.command: config: session.maintenance {mode:enforce, pruneAfter:30d, maxEntries:500, maxDiskBytes:2gb, highWaterBytes:1.6gb}
crons.notes: CHG-0831: Config-level session.maintenance at openclaw.json.session.maintenance. Runs automatically via Gateway. Daily cron: 176cd48b runs openclaw sessions cleanup --all-agents --enforce as enforcement pass.
